creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!
The same issue was reported to me yesterday as well.  Are you using home built packages or the ones from the official repo?

If you are building yourself, and using home built packages, can you please upgrade your ports tree and rebuild spamassassin, and see if the problem goes away.  There seem to have been a bug in the ports tree script that generates users and groups, which for a while affected this port, but it is supposedly solved now.
